rationale: Guidance specifies concrete acceptance criteria for data volume (1 million records) with processing speed targets (<5 minutes for 50GB dataset, 10,000 records/second). Adds explicit error handling (quarantine invalid records, continue with valid), recovery mechanism (checkpoint resumption), and reliability targets (99.5% success, guaranteed at-least-once delivery). Data quality rules specified (NULL validation, format constraints, duplicate detection). Token reduction from replacing vague terms like 'good', 'improve', 'optimize' with specific metrics and technical constraints.
